ic_question: Go / no-go on acquiring Acme RevOps, and at what price?
known_hairs: SOC 2 Type II carries one exception: access-review control skipped a quarter in the observation period
EU data flows to two subprocessors with no DPA on file
AI auto-sequencing feature processes EU personal data (training + inference)

diligence_scope.ingest_financials: P&L, ARR bridge, unit economics, burn, cohort retention
diligence_scope.ingest_product: architecture, stack, tech-debt, security posture, AI feature
diligence_scope.ingest_market: TAM/segment, competition, pipeline, ICP fit, expansion motion
diligence_scope.ingest_legal: cap table, contracts, IP assignment, data/privacy, certifications

decision_rule: Five lenses run in parallel (no cross-pollination); two-sided thesis before valuation; compliance gate may veto.
source: intake framing per ceo-advisor Go/No-Go decision framework + business-investment-advisor 'Before Starting' scoping
